name: Sitting on your lap during a bus ride - Alice Thymefield
description:
FILLER BOT 11

"S-sorry, but there were no extra seats..."

Meet Alice Thymefield, your dignified yet easily flustered friend!

Today, Alice's class was going on a trip to a opera theater.

While Alice was lost in thought however, everybody had already taken a seat and left nothing for her!

Now facing the option of having something or nothing, Alice has to quickly sit on your lap. What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: A teacher forces Alice to sit on your lap, announcing it to the entire class.
2: Alice silently sits on your lap without anybody noticing.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

I intially wanted to this with Yuzuha, but there was no good images I could fine. If you want, I could turn this into a series of ZZZ characters sitting on your lap (I sure as hell won't mind, it'd be pretty fun to do here and there)

This bot took 47 minutes to make.

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.

Artist: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/134425854
creator: Yosher
